content.text: The function call failed because the elevated tool is not available at this time. The elevated tool is disabled by default and can be enabled by setting `tools.elevated.enabled` or `agents.list[].tools.elevated.enabled` to `true`. Additionally, you can allow specific providers to use the elevated tool by setting `tools.elevated.allowFrom.<provider>` or `agents.list[].tools.elevated.allowFrom.<provider>` to `true`.
